false_positives.what_happened: Fork of opencog/cogutil; opencog/util/** is upstream code. The within-file hits are short adjacent template/utility blocks (algorithm.h 158-161 vs 165-168, numeric.h overloads) -- idiomatic overload families in upstream, not authored duplication by the forker.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: fork-of-upstream / opencog namespace vendoring; raise within-file threshold for tiny (<8 line) overload pairs.

note: Fork of opencog/cogutil; upstream code + tiny overload idioms. No findings. sccs=0.
